category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Gradle as an open-source build automation tool; official https://github.com/gradle/gradle describes it as a build automation tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is https://www.gradle.org/ and the official repository/README uses the name Gradle Build Tool.
docs_sources: Official Gradle repository links to https://docs.gradle.org/ and gradle.org publishes a documentation index at https://gradle.org/docs.html.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Gradle repository is linked from the Gradle GitHub organization and README at https://github.com/gradle/gradle.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names build automation based on Groovy and Kotlin DSL; official repository topics include java, kotlin, groovy, gradle, and build-tool.
